item.title: OptaSTATS: Opta Analyst US reposteó OptaSTATS @OptaSTATS · 4h José Soriano of the @Angels is the only MLB pitcher in the modern e
item.description: Opta Analyst US reposteó OptaSTATS @OptaSTATS · 4h José Soriano of the @Angels is the only MLB pitcher in the modern era to have a 5-start span (at any point) where he went 5-0 while allowing no more than 1 run and no more than a dozen hits. 3 102 624 17 mil
